name: Read Guardrail
description: Enforces read-only workspace isolation for the social agent. Guards read, image, pdf, and diffs tools via before_tool_call hook with allowlist-based path validation.

enabled.description: Enable or disable the read guardrail plugin.

socialAgentId.description: Agent ID to restrict. Defaults to 'social'.

allowedPaths.description: Paths the social agent is allowed to read (startsWith match after normalization).
